_comment: StreamFusion early-access feature manifest. The dedicated SF Patreon-gated EA flag system (separate chip) will eventually own this file; until it ships, main.js loads it (get-features IPC) and the renderer gates features with isFeatureEnabled(). earlyAccess:true means the feature is hidden behind the EA gate (linking Patreon — any tier, free included — or the standard EA entitlement unlocks it). Set earlyAccess:false to ship a feature to everyone.

stream-info-editor.name: Stream Info Editor
stream-info-editor.description: Edit your Twitch title, category and tags from inside StreamFusion, with cloud-synced favorite presets and quick-swap hotkeys.
